keySetup.title: Tọọ igodo ngwaọrụ gị
keySetup.description: Ngwaọrụ a enweghị igodo nzuzo gị ugbu a. Bubata nchekwa nwere paswọọdụ, ma ọ bụ mepụta igodo ọhụrụ (ị ga-enwe ike ịgụ ozi ọhụrụ site ugbu a).
keySetup.imported: Igodo nzuzo ebutara na ngwaọrụ a. Ị nwere ike ịgụ ozi ochie ugbu a.
keySetup.enterPassword: Tinye paswọọdụ akaụntụ gị ka anyị nwee ike ichekwa igodo gị n'ụzọ dị nchebe.

auth.headline: Ozi nchekwa maka onye ọ bụla, ebe ọ bụla
auth.description: Nchebe site n'aka abụọ, ntụgharị asụsụ 100+ asụsụ, ozi na-apụ n'anya, na ọkpụkpọ oku olu/vidiyo.

feature.encryption: Nchebe site n'aka abụọ site na ndabara
feature.translation: Ntụgharị ozi nwere ọgụgụ isi arụnyere
feature.privacy: Nchekwa mbụ. Data gị, njikwa gị.
feature.translate: Ntụgharị ozi nwere ọgụgụ isi arụnyere

hero.line1: Ozi nchekwa maka onye ọ bụla, ebe ọ bụla — na
hero.sub: Nweta nọmba ekwentị nchekwa efu iji kpọọ na zipụ ozi n'ụwa niile site na Wi-Fi ma ọ bụ data. Nwee ọṅụ nchebe site n'aka abụọ, ozi na-apụ n'anya, na ọkpụkpọ oku olu/vidiyo HD — na ngwaọrụ arụnyere nke na-enyere gị aka ịnọgide na njikọ n'ofe oke ala.
hero.freeNote: Ọkpụkpọ oku na ozi efu bụ n'efu. Ngwa AI dị elu na atụmatụ premium chọrọ nkwalite.

feat.encryption: Nchebe site n'aka abụọ, na-arụ ọrụ mgbe niile
feat.translate: Mechie ihe mgbochi asụsụ na mkparịta ụka gị
feat.privacy: Nchekwa mbụ. Data gị, njikwa gị.

auth.desktopTip: Na desktọp? Nyochaa na ekwentị gị iji nweta ngwa ahụ.
auth.scanHelper: Na desktọp? Nyochaa na ekwentị gị iji nweta ngwa ahụ.
auth.subhead: Ozi nzuzo, ezoro ezo, na ntụgharị — ozugbo.
auth.tip: Ndụmọdụ: Jiri otu akaụntụ na web na mkpanaka. Ozi gị na-anọgide na-emekọrịta.
auth.scanHint: Nyochaa iji budata ngwa ma ọ bụ mepee na ihe nchọgharị gị.

registration.passwordDescription: Opekata mpe mkpụrụedemede isii. Jiri paswọọdụ siri ike, pụrụ iche.
registration.smsConsent: Site n'ịmepụta akaụntụ, ị na-ekwenye ịnata ozi SMS metụtara ọrụ Chatforia gị (dị ka ozi sitere n'aka ndị ọrụ ndị ọzọ). Ọnụ ego ozi & data nwere ike itinye. Ị nwere ike ịpụ n'oge ọ bụla na Ntọala.

profile.title: Profailụ Onye
profile.mustLogin: Ị ga-abanye ka ị hụ ntọala.
profile.noPrivateKey: Enweghị igodo nzuzo na ngwaọrụ a ka ebupụ.
profile.setBackupPassword: Tọọ paswọọdụ iji zoo nchekwa gị:
profile.importSuccess: Igodo nzuzo ebutara na ngwaọrụ a.
profile.importFailed: Ibuta igodo dara (paswọọdụ ezighi ezi ma ọ bụ faịlụ mebiri).
profile.keysRotated: Igodo ọhụrụ emepụtara ma igodo ọha ebugoro.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Igodo nzuzo gị anaghị ahapụ ngwaọrụ a. Bubata nchekwa nwere paswọọdụ iji weghachite ya na ngwaọrụ ọzọ.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Ị nọ na Free—jiri nhọrọ Sun/Moon ngwa ngwa n'okpuru. Kwalite ka ịkpọghee isiokwu ndị ọzọ.
profile.backupDesc: Chekwa igodo nchebe gị iji weghachite ozi gị n'ụzọ dị nchebe na ngwaọrụ ọzọ.
profile.privacyBlurOnUnfocus: Zochie mgbe ngwa adịghị na nlele
profile.freePlanCopy: Ị nọ na atụmatụ efu. Kwalite ka ịkpọghee atụmatụ ndị ọzọ dị ka nchekwa, nọmba ndị ọzọ, na nhọrọ nzuzo dị elu.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Enweghị ike imepe ebe ịkwụ ụgwọ. Biko gbalịa ọzọ.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Gwa m ma a detuo ozi m
profile.followHint: Akụkọ ha ga-apụta na nri nri Eso gị ma ọ bụrụ na ha bipụtara na ndị na-eso (ma ọ bụ Ọha).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Ihe ọ bụla mehiere na ngalaba a.
profile.callTextForwardingTitle: Ọkpụkpọ na/ma ọ bụ Izigara Ozi
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Zigara ọkpụkpọ na ozi na-abata na ekwentị ma ọ bụ email ekwenyere gị. Ọkpụkpọ na ozi na-apụ nwere ike igosi nọmba Chatforia gị.
profile.errE164: Tinye nọmba ekwentị E.164 ziri ezi (dị ka +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Họrọ opekata mpe otu ebe (ekwentị ma ọ bụ email).
profile.ageBandHint: Anyị na-echekwa naanị ogo afọ (ọ bụghị ụbọchị ọmụmụ gị kpọmkwem). A na-eji ya eme ka mkpakọrịta Random Chat dị mma.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Jiri nhazi afọ na Mkparịta ụka Random
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Mgbe ọ bụ na, anyị na-agbalị ijikọ gị na ndị mmadụ n'ogo afọ dabara.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Ndị na-eto eto na-ejikọ naanị ndị na-eto eto ndị ọzọ. Ndị okenye enweghị ike ijikọ na ndị na-eto eto.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Maka nchekwa, akaụntụ n'ogo afọ 13–17 na-ejikọ naanị na akaụntụ 13–17 ndị ọzọ na Mkparịta ụka Random.
profile.foriaRemember: Hapụ Ria ka ọ cheta ihe ị na-agwa ya
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Mgbe nke a bụ na, Foria nwere ike iji mkparịta ụka Random Chat gị gara aga (naanị gị) iji mee ka mkparịta ụka na-aga n'ihu. Ị nwere ike gbanyụọ ya oge ọ bụla.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Hapụ oghere ka idobe ruo mgbe ebighị ebi
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: A na-eji ya mgbe nnabata ọdịyo gị adịghị.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Nnabata ozi olu ebudatara nke ọma
profile.voicemailNote: Ozi olu sitere na nọmba Chatforia gị ga-echekwa na igbe ozi olu gị. Ị nwere ike kwado ntụgharị na izigara na atụmatụ akwadoro.
profile.portHint: Ị chọrọ idobe nọmba gị ugbu a? Ị nwere ike ibubata ya n'ime Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Nweta data mkpanaka maka Chatforia mgbe ị nọ n'ebe Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Jikwaa atụmatụ mkpanaka Chatforia gị, nọmba, izigara, na ibubata nọmba.

options.heading: Họrọ otu ị chọrọ iji Chatforia
options.subheading: Ị nwere ike nweta nọmba Chatforia ọhụrụ, ma ọ bụ weta nọmba gị dị ugbu a site na onye ọzọ.
options.portNumber: Bubata nọmba gị ugbu a n'ime Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Bubata nọmba gị dị ugbu a
port.subheading: Bugharịa nọmba ekwentị gị ugbu a site na onye ọrụ gị n'ime Chatforia. Gbaa mbọ hụ na nkọwa dabara na akaụntụ onye ọrụ gị kpọmkwem iji zere igbu oge.
port.success: Arịrịọ bubata ezipụtara! Anyị ga-edobe gị na mmelite.

status.heading: Ọnọdụ bubata
status.subheading: Soro ọnọdụ arịrịọ bubata nọmba gị.

wireless.exhausted: Data gị agwụla. Zụọ ngwugwu ọhụrụ ka ịga n'ihu iji data mkpanaka.

error.invite: Enweghị ike ịmepụta ọkpụkpọ. Gbaa mbọ hụ na ị bụ onye nwe ezinụlọ wee gbalịa ọzọ.
error.checkout: Anyị enweghị ike ịmalite ịkwụ ụgwọ maka atụmatụ Ezinụlọ. Biko gbalịa ọzọ.

billing.freePlanCopy: Ị nọ na atụmatụ efu. Kwalite ka ịkpọghee atụmatụ ndị ọzọ.
billing.portalError: Enweghị ike imepe ebe ịkwụ ụgwọ ugbu a.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Ị nwere ike jikwaa ma ọ bụ kagbuo ndenye aha gị na ebe ịkwụ ụgwọ, ma ọ bụ kagbuo ozugbo n'okpuru.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Ị ji n'aka na ị chọrọ kagbuo atụmatụ gị ozugbo? Nke a enweghị ike ịmegharị.
billing.cancelNowError: Enweghị ike ịkagbu atụmatụ gị ugbu a. Biko gbalịa ọzọ ma ọ bụ jiri Jikwaa ịkwụ ụgwọ.

none.title: Enweghị ezinụlọ edobere ugbu a
none.body: Iji mepụta Ezinụlọ Chatforia na ebe data ekekọrịta, malite atụmatụ Ezinụlọ.

data.heading: Ebe data ekekọrịta
data.caption: Ndị otu niile na-ekekọrịta ebe a. Anyị ga-adọ gị aka na ntị ka ị na-eru oke gị.

invite.title: Kpọ onye otu ọhụrụ
invite.body: Zipụ email ma ọ bụ njikọ ka ịkpọ onye n'ime ebe data ezinụlọ ekekọrịta gị.
invite.expiryHint: Njikọ a na-ekwụsị mgbe ụbọchị ole na ole. Ị nwere ike ịmepụta nke ọhụrụ mgbe niile.

join.title: Banye n'ezinụlọ
join.body: A kpọrọ gị ka ị banye n'Ezinụlọ Chatforia ma ọ bụrụ na ị na-ekekọrịta ebe data ha.
join.success: Ị banyela n'ezinụlọ a. Ị na-ekekọrịta ebe data ha ugbu a.
join.error: Anyị enweghị ike itinye gị na ezinụlọ a. Ọkpụkpọ nwere ike ịdịghị mma ma ọ bụ agwụla.

premium.heading: Gaa Premium
premium.description: Kpọghee atụmatụ ike & wepụ mgbasa ozi.

upgrade.title: Kwalite
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Malite na atụmatụ efu nwere mgbasa ozi. Gaa n'enweghị mgbasa ozi na Plus, ma ọ bụ kpọghee atụmatụ ike zuru ezu na Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Họrọ atụmatụ ngwa, tinye ngwugwu data maka onwe gị, ma ọ bụ kekọrịta data na ezinụlọ gị — niile site n'otu ebe.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Malite na atụmatụ efu nwere mgbasa ozi. Gaa n'enweghị mgbasa ozi na Plus, ma ọ bụ kpọghee atụmatụ ike zuru ezu na Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Tinye data eSIM zuru ụwa ka Chatforia na-arụ ọrụ ọbụna mgbe ị nọ n'ebe Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Mepụta ebe data ekekọrịta maka ezinụlọ gị ma jikwaa ojiji onye ọ bụla site n'otu ebe.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Kpọghee atụmatụ ike & wepụ mgbasa ozi.

free.title: Efu
free.desc: Malite ozi n'efu. Dị mma ma ọ bụrụ na ị na-anwale Chatforia.

features.chat: Mkparịta ụka 1:1 na otu oge, gbakwunyere ọkpụkpọ olu na vidiyo

features.ads: Efu ruo mgbe ebighị ebi na mgbasa ozi na ngwa

plus.desc: Ihe niile dị mkpa, na-enweghị mgbasa ozi. Dị mma maka ozi na ọkpụkpọ kwa ụbọchị.

features.allPremium: Ihe niile na Premium Ọnwa — gụnyere isiokwu agba ndị ọzọ
features.annualBilling: A na-akwụ ụgwọ otu ugboro kwa afọ

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: A na-akwụ ụgwọ n'ihu. Kagbuo oge ọ bụla. Enweghị ụgwọ zoro ezo.

marketing.plusDesc: Ahụmịhe n'enweghị mgbasa ozi dị ọnụ ala kacha.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Atụmatụ zuru ezu, ụda olu, na ngwaọrụ ike AI.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Chekwaa karịa mgbe a na-akwụ ụgwọ kwa afọ.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: A na-akwụ ụgwọ n'ihu. Kagbuo oge ọ bụla. Enweghị ụgwọ zoro ezo.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mkpanaka (ngwugwu data eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Tinye data zuru ụwa ka Chatforia na-arụ ọrụ ọbụna na-enweghị Wi-Fi. Ọnụahịa na-agbanwe na-akpaghị aka dabere na mba gị na ego.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Họrọ ngwugwu data zuru ụwa otu oge ka Chatforia na-arụ ọrụ mgbe ị na-eme njem ma ọ bụ n'ebe Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Anyị anaghị ere ngwugwu data n'okpuru 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Data ọsọ dị elu maka ojiji siri ike
features.throttle: Ọsọ nwere ike belata mgbe ojiji dị elu
features.coverage: Mkpuchi a pụrụ ịdabere na ya

disclaimer.devices: Ngwugwu data eSIM chọrọ ngwaọrụ eSIM dakọtara na emeghe. Ọdịnaya na-adị iche dabere na ụdị ekwentị, onye ọrụ, na mba. Mkpuchi na ọsọ na-adị iche dabere na mpaghara.

small.title: Ngwugwu mmalite
small.desc: Gụnyere 3 GB nke data ọsọ dị elu — dị mma maka ozi dị mfe na ọkpụkpọ oge ụfọdụ.
small.bestFor: Njem dị mkpụmkpụ, ozi dị mfe, na ọkpụkpọ oge ụfọdụ

medium.title: Ngwugwu njem
medium.desc: Gụnyere 5 GB nke data ọsọ dị elu maka njem, njem, na ọkpụkpọ VoIP oge niile.
medium.bestFor: Njem izu ụka, ọkpụkpọ VoIP oge niile, na map

large.title: Ngwugwu ike
large.desc: Gụnyere 10 GB nke data ọsọ dị elu maka mkparịta ụka siri ike, ọkpụkpọ, na vidiyo na netwọk Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Mkparịta ụka siri ike, ọkpụkpọ, vidiyo, na ojiji hotspot
large.aria: Zụọ ngwugwu data eSIM onye ọrụ ike

compare.title: Tụnyere ngwugwu data eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ojiji data n'ezie dabere n'otú ị na-eji Chatforia (olu, vidiyo, mgbasa ozi, na ngwa ndị ọzọ na ekwentị gị).

family.title: Ezinụlọ Chatforia (data ekekọrịta)
family.subtitle: Kekọrịta otu ebe data n'ofe ezinụlọ gị. Otu ụgwọ, akaụntụ Chatforia ọtụtụ, mkpuchi zuru ụwa.

small.title: Ezinụlọ Obere
small.desc: Gụnyere 20 GB nke data ọsọ dị elu ekekọrịta — dị mma maka ndị ọrụ 2–3 dị mfe.

medium.title: Ezinụlọ Ọkara
medium.desc: Gụnyere 40 GB nke data ọsọ dị elu ekekọrịta — dị mma maka ndị otu 3–5 na-arụ ọrụ.

large.title: Ezinụlọ Nnukwu
large.desc: Gụnyere 80 GB nke data ọsọ dị elu ekekọrịta — maka ezinụlọ ike na-anọ n'ịntanetị mgbe niile.

feature.shared: Ebe data ekekọrịta maka ezinụlọ gị
feature.members: Kpọ ruo ndị otu 4 ndị ọzọ
feature.membersMore: Dị mma maka ndị otu 3–5 na-arụ ọrụ
feature.manage: Jikwaa oke maka onye ọ bụla
feature.topUp: Tinye ngwugwu ọzọ oge ọ bụla
feature.fairUse: Dabere na amụma ojiji ziri ezi na oke obodo

family.disclaimer: Ngwugwu ezinụlọ na-emepụta ma ọ bụ tinye ebe data ekekọrịta. Ị nwere ike ịkpọ ma wepụ ndị otu oge ọ bụla.
family.footnote: Ngwugwu ezinụlọ na-ekekọrịta otu ebe data n'ofe akaụntụ Chatforia ejikọrọ. Ọdịnaya na oke dabere na mba gị na iwu obodo.

why.title: Gịnị mere ndị mmadụ ji gbanwee na Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia na-enye gị nọmba ekwentị n'ezie, ntụgharị nwere ọgụgụ isi, na ụzọ doro anya ịga n'enweghị mgbasa ozi mgbe ị dị njikere.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Mgbasa ozi dị mfe na Efu, nkwalite Plus dị mfe mgbe ị dị njikere, na ngwaọrụ Premium TextNow anaghị enye.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Ngwa ọgbara ọhụrụ, nhazi zuru ụwa mbụ, na ntụgharị arụnyere kama izigara ọkpụkpọ ochie.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs ngwa mkparịta ụka
messengers.body: Zigara nọmba ekwentị n'ezie — ọ bụghị naanị ndị ọrụ ngwa ndị ọzọ — na AI na ọnọdụ arụnyere. Dị mma ma ọ bụrụ na ị si na ngwa dị ka TextFree ma ọ bụ TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ntụnyere dabere na ozi dị n'ihu ọha ma nwere ike ịgbanwe ka oge na-aga. Ngwa izigara ozi efu ndị ọzọ dị ka TextFree ma ọ bụ TextMe na-adịkarị ka TextNow.

free.q: Atụmatụ Efu ọ bụ n'ezie n'efu?
free.a: Ee. Atụmatụ Efu gụnyere nọmba Chatforia, ọkpụkpọ, na ozi na mgbasa ozi. Ị nwere ike ịnọ na Efu ogologo oge ị chọrọ, ma ọ bụ kwalite ka iwepụ mgbasa ozi ma kpọghee atụmatụ ndị ọzọ.

plusPremium.q: Kedụ ihe dị iche n'etiti Plus na Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus na-ewepụ mgbasa ozi ma na-agbatị akụkọ ozi gị — zuru ezu maka ojiji kwa ụbọchị. Premium na-agbakwụnye nhazi ọzọ, ngwaọrụ AI maka idegharị na azịza, na nkwado mbụ maka ndị ọrụ siri ike.

esim.q: Ebee ka ngwugwu data eSIM na-arụ ọrụ?
esim.a: Chatforia Mkpanaka na-eji mkpuchi eSIM zuru ụwa. Ọdịnaya dabere na mba gị na ngwaọrụ. Ị ga-ahụ nhọrọ akwadoro n'oge ntinye n'ime ngwa.

cancel.q: Enwere m ike ịkagbu ma ọ bụ gbanwee atụmatụ oge ọ bụla?
cancel.a: Ee. Ị nwere ike jikwaa ma ọ bụ kagbuo ndenye aha gị site na ibe ịkwụ ụgwọ n'ime ngwa. Mgbanwe na-amalite na njedebe nke oge ịkwụ ụgwọ ugbu a.

family.q: Otu ngwugwu Ezinụlọ si arụ ọrụ?
family.a: Ngwugwu Ezinụlọ na-emepụta ebe data ekekọrịta n'ofe akaụntụ Chatforia ọtụtụ. Otu onye na-akwụ ụgwọ, ma ị nwere ike ịkpọ ma ọ bụ wepụ ndị otu ma tọọ oke kwa onye.

gettingStarted.title: Malite
gettingStarted.subtitle: Ọhụrụ na Chatforia? Ntuziaka ngwa ngwa a na-egosi ihe dị mkpa ka ị nwee ike ịrụ ọrụ n'ime nkeji.

alert.text: Ntuziaka a ga-etolite ka anyị na-ebupụta atụmatụ ọhụrụ. Ọ bụrụ na ihe na-efu, gwa anyị site na

section1.title: 1) Mepụta akaụntụ gị
section1.loginText: na akaụntụ gị dị ugbu a.

section2.title: 2) Malite ozi
section2.item1: Mepụta DM ma ọ bụ Otu wee zipụ ozi mbụ gị.
section2.item2: Jiri ntụgharị ozugbo iji kparịta ụka n'ofe asụsụ 100+.
section2.item3: Nwale ozi na-apụ n'anya na nnabata ọgụgụ na Profailụ → Nzuzo.

section3.title: 3) Gaa n'ihu
section3.item1: Ị nwere ike kwalite na atụmatụ akwụ ụgwọ oge ọ bụla n'ime ngwa.
section3.item2: Ozugbo ị banyere, ị nwere ike jikọ ngwaọrụ ndị ọzọ ma tọọ nchekwa ezoro ezo site na Ntọala n'ime ngwa.

account.q: Kedụ ka m si mepụta ma ọ bụ weghachite akaụntụ m?
account.a: Budata ngwa ma ọ bụ jiri web, pịa “Mepụta akaụntụ”, kwado email/ekwentị gị. Iji weghachite, jiri “Echefuola paswọọdụ”.

privacy.q: Ozi ọ bụ nchebe site n'aka abụọ?
privacy.a: Ee. Ozi na ọkpụkpọ na-enwe nchebe site n'aka abụọ site na ndabara. Naanị gị na onye nnata nwere ike ịgụ ha.

translate.q: Kedụ ka ntụgharị ozugbo si arụ ọrụ?
translate.a: Kwado “Ntụgharị akpaaka” na Ntọala → Ọdịdị & Asụsụ. Anyị na-atụgharị na ngwaọrụ ebe akwadoro, ma ọ bụghị site na API nchekwa nwere metadata dị nta.

contact.a: Bịakwute anyị na support@chatforia.com. Gụnyere screenshot na ụdị ngwa gị.

contact.title: Kpọtụrụ Anyị
contact.successMsg: Daalụ—ndị otu anyị ga-azaghachi site na email.
contact.errorSend: Enweghị ike iziga. Biko email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Amụma Nzuzo a na-akọwa otú Chatforia (“anyị”, “anyị”) si anakọta, na-eji, ma na-ekekọrịta ozi mgbe ị na-eji ngwa na ọrụ anyị. Anyị na-emepụta Chatforia iji belata data anyị nwere ike ịnweta.

infoWeCollect.title: Ozi anyị na-anakọta
infoWeCollect.account: Ozi akaụntụ (dị ka email/ekwentị) iji mepụta ma chekwaa akaụntụ gị.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Ọdịnaya ezoro ezo (ozi/ọkpụkpọ) nwere nchebe site n'aka abụọ; anyị enweghị ike ịgụ ya.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Nchọpụta/ojiji dị ka ndekọ mmejọ, ụdị ngwaọrụ, ma ọ bụ nyocha siri ike iji melite arụmọrụ.

sms.title: Nọmba ekwentị mkpanaka na SMS
sms.body: Ọ bụrụ na ị họrọ inye nọmba ekwentị mkpanaka, anyị na-eji ya iji mee ka atụmatụ dị ka nkwenye akaụntụ, mgbama nbanye, na ozi onye na onye site na SMS ebe akwadoro. Anyị nwere ike iziga ozi SMS azụmahịa metụtara akaụntụ gị na ọrụ na Chatforia. Ị nwere ike ịpụ n'ịnata ozi SMS oge ọ bụla site n'ịzaghachi na mkpụrụokwu ịpụ akwadoro (dị ka “STOP”) ma ọ bụ site n'ịgbanwe nhọrọ mgbama na ngwa. Anyị anaghị ere nọmba ekwentị gị ma ọ bụ jiri ya maka ahịa na-enweghị njikọ.
sms.enterRecipient: Tinye aha ma ọ bụ nọmba
sms.addRecipient: Tinye onye nnata n'elu ka ịmalite…

howWeUse.title: Otu anyị si eji ozi
howWeUse.provide: Nye ma chekwaa ọrụ (nbanye, nchọpụta spam/abuse).

sharing.title: Ịkekọrịta
sharing.body: Anyị anaghị ere data nkeonwe. Anyị nwere ike ịkekọrịta data nwere oke na ndị na-edozi (dị ka mgbama ntinye, nyocha) n'okpuru nkwekọrịta siri ike.

rights.title: Ikike gị
rights.body: Dabere na mpaghara gị (dị ka GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ị nwere ike ịrịọ ịnweta, mmezi, ihicha, ma ọ bụ ịpụ n'ụfọdụ nhazi. Kpọtụrụ: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Njide data & nchebe
retention.body: Anyị na-ejide naanị ihe dị mkpa iji rụọ ọrụ ọrụ ma tinye nchebe ụlọ ọrụ ọkọlọtọ. Ọdịnaya E2E enweghị ike ịmegharị site n'aka anyị.

children.title: Ụmụaka
children.body: Chatforia anaghị ezipụta ụmụaka n'okpuru 13 (ma ọ bụ dị ka iwu obodo gị chọrọ).

changes.title: Mgbanwe
changes.body: Anyị ga-ebipụta mmelite ebe a ma degharịa ụbọchị “Emelitere ikpeazụ”.

contact.title: Kpọtụrụ
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Site n'iji Chatforia ị na-ekwenye na usoro ndị a. Ọ bụrụ na ị ekwenyeghị, ejila ọrụ ahụ.

accounts.title: Akaụntụ
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Nye ozi ziri ezi ma debe nzuzo gị nchebe.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Ị na-ahụ maka ọrụ na akaụntụ gị.

acceptableUse.title: Ojiji anabatara
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Enweghị ọdịnaya iwu, mkpasu iwe, ma ọ bụ nke na-emebi iwu; enweghị spam ma ọ bụ mkpasu iwe akpaaka.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Anyị nwere ike nkwụsị/kagbuo maka mmebi.

sms.title: Ozi SMS
sms.body: Ọ bụrụ na ị nyere nọmba ekwentị mkpanaka, ị na-ekwenye na Chatforia nwere ike iziga gị ozi SMS metụtara akaụntụ gị na ojiji ọrụ, dị ka mgbama nbanye, mgbama nche, na ozi metụtara mkparịta ụka ị malitere ma ọ bụ sonyere. Anyị anaghị eji SMS maka ozi nkwalite ma ọ bụ ahịa na-enweghị nkwenye gị doro anya. Ọnụ ego ozi na data ọkọlọtọ nwere ike itinye. Ị nwere ike ịpụ n'ozi SMS oge ọ bụla site n'ịzaghachi na mkpụrụokwu ịpụ akwadoro (dị ka “STOP”) ma ọ bụ site n'ịmelite ntọala mgbama gị na ngwa.

yourContent.title: Ọdịnaya gị
yourContent.body: Ị na-ejide ikike nke ọdịnaya gị. Ị na-enye anyị ikike dị mkpa iji rụọ ọrụ ọrụ (dị ka ịgbagharị, nchekwa, ntụgharị).

disclaimer.title: Nkwupụta & ụgwọ
disclaimer.body: A na-enye ọrụ “dị ka ọ dị” na-enweghị nkwa. Ruo oke iwu kwere, Chatforia anaghị ahụ maka mmebi na-apụtaghị ma ọ bụ nke na-esote.

changes.title: Mgbanwe
changes.body: Anyị nwere ike ịmelite usoro ndị a; iji gaa n'ihu mgbe mgbanwe pụtara nnabata.

contact.title: Kpọtụrụ
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ereghị ma ọ bụ Kekọrịta Ozi Nkeonwe M
doNotSell.body: Chatforia anaghị ere ozi nkeonwe. Ndị California nwere ike ịziga arịrịọ n'okpuru CPRA site na bọtịnụ n'okpuru.

cookies.title: Ntọala Kuki
cookies.body: Chatforia na-eji kuki dị nta (dị ka oge, nche). Anyị anaghị eji kuki mgbasa ozi ndị ọzọ. Jikwaa kuki site na ntọala ihe nchọgharị gị.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Enweghị ike ịbụ ọnọdụ nọmba ekwentị.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Enweghị nọmba ekenyere. Họrọ otu site na koodu mpaghara ka ịmalite iziga ozi.

startChatModal.title: Malite mkparịta ụka
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Pịa aha, aha njirimara, ekwentị, ma ọ bụ email…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Chọọ site na aha njirimara ma ọ bụ ekwentị
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Pịa aha njirimara ma ọ bụ ekwentị wee pịa Chọọ.
startChatModal.pickFromContacts: Ma ọ bụ họrọ site na kọntaktị
startChatModal.pickAtLeastOne: Họrọ opekata mpe otu onye nnata.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Ntinye ekwentị/email ga-adị mgbe ị chekwaa ha dị ka kọntaktị.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Izigara mkparịta ụka na ndị nnata ahọpụtara dara.
startChatModal.firstMessageOptional: Ozi mbụ (nke ọ bụla mana a tụrụ aro)

sounds.freeNotice: Ị nọ na Efu — ụda premium egosiri mana kpọchiri. Kwalite ka ịkpọghee ha niile.

aiSettings.title: Ntọala AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Jikwaa ntụgharị, azịza nwere ọgụgụ isi, na azịza akpaaka ForiaBot.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Zipụ ozi ole na ole enwetara (sanitized) na AI iji tụọ azịza ngwa ngwa.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Zochie okwu rụrụ arụ na ntụnye AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Ọ bụrụ na ọ bụ na, ntụnye AI weghachiri ga-enwe okwu akara zochiri
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Kwado azịza akpaaka mgbe m nọ na-arụ ọrụ
aiSettings.translateTagged: Naanị mgbe @translated ma ọ bụ akara

accessibilitySettings.title: Ịnweta & Mgbama
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Nhọrọ iji mee Chatforia mfe iji na-enweghị ịdabere na ụda.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Na-amalite na ogo nkịtị. Ịbawanye ma ọ bụrụ na ị chọrọ ederede buru ibu na ntọala ịnweta.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Mgbama anya maka ozi & ọkpụkpọ
Gosi banna na mgbama aha ka ị ghara ịhapụ ọrụ.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Na-ama jijiji na ozi ọhụrụ (mgbe akwadoro)
Na-akpali jijiji ngwaọrụ na mgbama.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Na-egbuke egbuke ihuenyo na ọkpụkpọ na-abata
Ọkụ dị mkpụmkpụ mgbe ọkpụkpọ na-akụ.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Tinye ntụgharị na ozi ọdịyo ị na-anata.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Gosi banna na mgbama aha ka ị ghara ịhapụ ọrụ.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Na-ama jijiji na ozi ọhụrụ (mgbe akwadoro)
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Na-egbuke egbuke ihuenyo na ọkpụkpọ na-abata
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Ọkụ dị mkpụmkpụ mgbe ọkpụkpọ na-akụ.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Nchebe site n'aka abụọ siri ike
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Chekwa naanị ciphertext na ihe nkesa. Na-agbanwụ AI/Ntụgharị na nlele nlekọta.

help.title: Enyemaka
help.howCanWeHelp: Kedụ ka anyị si enyere gị aka?
help.searchExamples: Nwale ọchụchọ maka “ntụgharị”, “nchekwa”, ma ọ bụ “nzuzo”.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Chọọ site na alias, aha, aha njirimara, ma ọ bụ ekwentị
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Ụzọ ole na ole ngwa ngwa iji malite.
peoplePage.findOrAdd: Chọta ma ọ bụ tinye onye
peoplePage.searchByPhoneOrUsername: Chọọ site na ekwentị / aha njirimara
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Kekọrịta njikọ ọkpụkpọ gị ka ịmalite ikparịta ụka ozugbo.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Nọgide na njikọ n'ụzọ na-aga na Chatforia maka iOS na Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Ndụmọdụ: Ozi gị na-anọgide na-emekọrịta n'ofe web na mkpanaka.

randomChat.title: Mkparịta ụka Random
randomChat.description: Zute onye ọhụrụ ozugbo. Anyị ga-ejikọ gị ma mepee ụlọ mkparịta ụka nwa oge. Kparịta ụka n'ụzọ na-amaghị aha mbụ. Tinye enyi ma ọ bụrụ na ọ dị mma.
randomChat.noPartner: Enweghị onye mmekọ achọtara ugbu a.
randomChat.saveGuard: Naanị mkparịta ụka mmadụ na mmadụ nwere ike ichekwa
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Anyị na-echekwa naanị ogo afọ (ọ bụghị ụbọchị ọmụmụ gị kpọmkwem). A na-eji ya eme ka mkpakọrịta Random Chat dị mma. Iji jikọta ndị mmadụ (ọ bụghị naanị RiaBot), tọọ ogo afọ gị na Ntọala → Ogo Afọ & Mkparịta ụka Random.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Tọọ ogo afọ gị na Profailụ → Ogo Afọ & Mkparịta ụka Random ka ejikọta na ndị mmadụ.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Iji jikọta ndị mmadụ (ọ bụghị naanị RiaBot), tọọ ogo afọ gị na Ntọala → Ogo Afọ & Mkparịta ụka Random.
randomChat.subtitle: Zute onye ọhụrụ ozugbo, ma ọ bụ họrọ ịkparịta ụka na Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Tọọ ogo afọ gị na Profailụ → Ogo Afọ & Mkparịta ụka Random ka ejikọta na ndị mmadụ.

ria.intro: Hey ebe ahụ 👋 Abụ m Ria. Gịnị dị n'uche gị?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 Anọ m ebe a. Gịnị dị n'uche gị?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Gịnị ka ị chọrọ ikwu maka taa?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}!! Anọ m na ntị — gịnị na-eme?
greetings.long4: Ọ dị m ụtọ ịhụ gị, {{name}} 👋 Gịnị dị n'uche gị taa?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 😊 Ị chọrọ ịkọ, ịjụ, ma ọ bụ naanị kparịta ụka?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Enwere m oge — gịnị ka ị chọrọ ikwu maka?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, m ka nọ ebe a. Gịnị na-eme?
greetings.short2: Nnọọ azụ {{name}} 👋 Ọ bụla ọzọ ị chọrọ ịgbakwụnye?
greetings.short3: Azụ ọzọ, {{name}}? 😊 Gwa m gịnị dị n'uche gị.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} 👋 Njikere ịmalite ebe anyị hapụrụ?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}!! Enwere ihe ọhụrụ n'uche gị?

login.title: Gaa n'ihu na Chatforia
login.subtitle: Banye na akaụntụ Chatforia gị

forgot.title: Echefuola Paswọọdụ
forgot.helper: Tinye email ị jiri mepụta akaụntụ Chatforia gị anyị ga-eziga gị njikọ nchekwa iji tọgharịa paswọọdụ gị.
forgot.genericError: Enweghị ike ịhazi arịrịọ. Biko gbalịa ọzọ n'oge ole na ole.
forgot.sentHelper: Ọ bụrụ na akaụntụ dị na email ahụ, anyị ezipụla njikọ tọgharịa paswọọdụ. Ọ nwere ike were nkeji ole na ole ịbịarute. Gbaa mbọ hụ spam ma ọ bụ nchekwa nkwalite gị.

login.ssoUnavailable: Nbanye otu adịghị ugbu a. Jiri aha njirimara & paswọọdụ kama.

error.invalid: Aha njirimara ma ọ bụ paswọọdụ ezighi ezi
error.unprocessable: Arịrịọ ezighi ezi. Lelee aha njirimara/email na paswọọdụ gị.
error.deviceLimit: Oke ngwaọrụ eruola maka atụmatụ Efu. Pụọ na ngwaọrụ ọzọ ma ọ bụ kwalite na Premium iji jikọ ngwaọrụ ndị ọzọ.

video.roomsIntro: Banye ma ọ bụ mepụta ụlọ otu ọtụtụ.
video.deeplinkTip: Ndụmọdụ: ị nwere ike jikọ kpọmkwem na /video?room=aha-ụlọ.

direct.subtitle: Malite ọkpụkpọ vidiyo 1:1 site na nọmba ekwentị ma ọ bụ aha njirimara Chatforia.

direct.tipInvite: Ndụmọdụ: Detuo nọmba ma kpọọ na-enweghị ichekwa kọntaktị. Anyị ga-akpọ ndị na-abụghị ndị ọrụ site na njikọ.

support.heading: Kedụ ka anyị si enyere gị aka?
support.trySearching: Nwale ọchụchọ maka “ntụgharị”, “nchekwa”, ma ọ bụ “nzuzo”.
support.contactIntro: Anyị ga-eziga gị azịza site na email. Gụnyere nkọwa iji nyere anyị aka ịmegharị nsogbu ahụ.
support.sent: Ozi ezipụtara. Anyị ga-azaghachi site na email.
support.sendError: Enweghị ike iziga. Email support@chatforia.com kama.

encryptionRecovery.title: Jikwaa Nchebe
encryptionRecovery.description: Chekwa, weghachite, kpọghee, ma ọ bụ tọgharịa igodo nchebe gị.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Ihe nchọgharị a enweghị ike ịmegharị ozi ezoro ezo gị ugbu a. Weghachite, kpọghee, ma ọ bụ tọgharịa igodo gị ka ịga n'ihu.

unlockPasscode.label: Kpọghee paswọọdụ (ngwaọrụ ugbu a)
unlockPasscode.description: A na-eji ya ịmegharị igodo gị na mpaghara tupu ibupụ

backupPassword.label: Paswọọdụ nchekwa
backupPassword.description: A na-eji ya zoo faịlụ nchekwa

restoreBackupPassword.label: Paswọọdụ nchekwa
restoreBackupPassword.description: Paswọọdụ ị mepụtara mgbe ị na-echekwa igodo gị na iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Paswọọdụ mpaghara ọhụrụ
newLocalPasscode.description: Chekwaa igodo n'ụra na ihe nchọgharị a

resetLocalPasscode.description: Chọrọ tupu ịtọgharịa ka igodo ọhụrụ chekwaa na ngwaọrụ a

messages.keyRestored: Igodo eweghachitara site na nchekwa akaụntụ.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Weghachite igodo ezughị ezu ma ọ bụ ezighi ezi maka akaụntụ a
errors.noBackup: Enweghị nchekwa ezoro ezo dị maka akaụntụ a
errors.noServerPublicKey: Akaụntụ a anaghị egosi igodo ọha ihe nkesa ugbu a
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Nchekwa ihe nkesa adabaghị na igodo nchebe akaụntụ ugbu a

confirm.reset:
Tọgharịa nchebe maka akaụntụ a?

Ozi ezoro ezo ochie nwere ike ịghọ nke a na-agụghị ma ọ bụrụ na ị weghachite igodo mbụ mgbe e mesịrị.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Nke a na-emepụta igodo nchebe ọhụrụ maka akaụntụ gị. Ozi ezoro ezo ochie nwere ike ịghọ nke a na-agụghị ma ọ bụrụ na ị weghachite igodo mbụ mgbe e mesịrị.

press.title: Mgbasa ozi
press.contactLine: Maka ajụjụ mgbasa ozi, bịakwute anyị na
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia bụ ngwa ozi nchekwa mbụ nke na-eme ka mkparịta ụka asụsụ dị mfe. Ozi nwere nchebe site n'aka abụọ site na ndabara, na ntụgharị arụnyere na-akwado asụsụ 100+ n'oge n'ezie. Ndị ọrụ nwere ike kwado ozi na-apụ n'anya, debe nnabata ọgụgụ nke ọ bụla, ma emekọrịta n'ofe ngwaọrụ. Dị na iOS, Android, na web.
press.scanTip: Na desktọp? Nyochaa na ekwentị gị iji nweta ngwa ahụ.

careers.title: Ọrụ
careers.intro: Anyị bụ obere otu ntọala na-ewu Chatforia — ozi zuru ụwa nchekwa na-amalite na web, iOS, na Android. Ọ bụrụ na ị na-eche banyere nzuzo, nchebe, na ahụmịhe onye ọrụ mara mma, anyị ga-enwe obi ụtọ ịnụ gị.
careers.openRoles: Ọrụ ntọala mepere emepe: Onye isi Injinia Full-stack, Injinia Azụ (Node.js), Injinia Frontend/Web (React), Injinia Mkpanaka (iOS), Injinia Mkpanaka (Android), DevOps/SRE, Injinia Nche & Nchebe, Injinia Telecom (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Otu esi etinye: Jiri bọtịnụ n'okpuru email CV gị na njikọ.
careers.whyNow: Gịnị mere ị ga-eji sonye ugbu a?
careers.whyBullets:
• Nyere aka wuo ntọala nke ozi zuru ụwa ọhụrụ.
• Zipụ mmelite ejiri na web, iOS, na Android.
• Rụọ ọrụ ozugbo na onye ntọala na nhazi na ntụziaka ngwaahịa.
• Nwe mpaghara ọrụ dị elu nke stack: ozi, olu, vidiyo, nchebe, telecom, AI.
• Sonye na mmalite — tupu ndị ọrụ na-abawanye.

about.title: Banyere Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia bụ ozi nchekwa, ọtụtụ asụsụ nwere nchebe site n'aka abụọ, ntụgharị ozugbo, na ọkpụkpọ olu/vidiyo. Ebumnuche anyị dị mfe: nyere ndị mmadụ aka ijikọ — n'ụzọ dị nchebe, nzuzo, na n'ofe asụsụ.

values.privacy: Nzuzo mbụ: Nchebe site n'aka abụọ site na ndabara.
values.access: Ịnweta maka onye ọ bụla: Ntụgharị akpaaka asụsụ 100+.
values.control: Njikwa: Ozi na-apụ n'anya & nnabata ọgụgụ bụ nke ọ bụla.
values.privacy_aria: Nzuzo mbụ: Nchebe site n'aka abụọ site na ndabara.
values.access_aria: Ịnweta maka onye ọ bụla: Ntụgharị akpaaka asụsụ 100+.
values.control_aria: Njikwa: Ozi na-apụ n'anya na nnabata ọgụgụ bụ nke ọ bụla.

about.howDescription: Ozi na-ezoro ezo na ngwaọrụ gị tupu ha ahapụ ya. Ntụgharị, nchekwa, na mmekọrịta ngwaọrụ emepụtara iji belata ihe ihe nkesa anyị nwere ike ịhụ.

advertise.title: Mgbasa ozi na Chatforia
advertise.description: Ruo ndị ọrụ ozi na-etinye aka na ebe nchekwa, nchekwa akara. Anyị na-enye ngwa ngwa banner n'ebe a na-ahụ anya, nkwado, na nkwalite ụlọ. Ndị debanyere aha Premium anaghị ahụ mgbasa ozi.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Anyị na-enye ngwa ngwa site na Google AdSense. Ị nwere ike tụọ Chatforia na ID onye mbipụta {{pubId}}, ma ọ bụ jiri fọm n'okpuru maka nkwado kpọmkwem.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Anyị na-enye ụfọdụ ngwa ngwa site na Google AdSense. Nkwado kpọmkwem dị — jiri fọm n'okpuru.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Anyị na-emecha ngwa ngwa mgbasa ozi anyị. Gwa anyị maka mkpọsa gị anyị ga-atụ aro ebe.

why.highSession: Oge nnọkọ dị elu na oge nọrọ na UI mkparịta ụka
why.brandSafe: Ụdị nchekwa akara; njedebe ugboro ugboro nkwanye ùgwù
why.sponsoredMoments: Oge nkwado (dị ka “Malite Mkparịta ụka” modal) dị
why.deals: Nkwekọrịta kpọmkwem ma ọ bụ usoro site na AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Daalụ! Ajụjụ gị na-aga. Anyị ga-esochi n'oge na-adịghị anya.
form.missingRequired: Biko dejupụta aha, email, na ozi.
form.successToast: Daalụ! Anyị ga-abịakwute gị n'oge na-adịghị anya.
form.mailtoInfo: Na-emeghe ihe nchọgharị email gị iji zipụ ajụjụ…
form.budgetLabel: Ọnụ ego kwa ọnwa (nke ọ bụla)
